query:
INSERT INTO account_data (account_id, data)
        VALUES ($1, $2)
        ON CONFLICT (account_id)
        DO UPDATE SET 
            data = jsonb_set(
                COALESCE(account_data.data, '{}'::jsonb),
                '{integrations,github}',
                $2->'integrations'->'github',
                true
            ),
            updated_at = now()
